# awscc_wellarchitected_review_template (Resource)

Creates a review template for the Well-Architected Tool.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) The review template description.
- `lenses` (List of String) The lenses applied to the review template.
- `template_name` (String) The name of the review template.

### Optional

- `notes` (String) The notes associated with the review template.
- `tags` (Attributes Set) The tags assigned to the review template. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `owner` (String) The owner of the review template.
- `template_arn` (String) The review template ARN.
- `update_status` (String) The latest status of the review template.
- `updated_at` (String) The date and time the review template was last updated.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Optional:

- `key` (String)
- `value` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_wellarchitected_review_template.example
  identity = {
    template_arn = "template_arn"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `template_arn` (String) The review template ARN

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_wellarchitected_review_template.example
  id = "template_arn"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_wellarchitected_review_template.example "template_arn"
```
